project.name: maasai-language-showcase
project.description: English ↔ Maasai translation and Maasai speech transcription showcase for Hugging Face Spaces.

primary: Build a strong English to Maasai translation model
Integrate Maasai speech transcription using Microsoft Paza ASR
Deploy a polished public Hugging Face Space
secondary: Create a reusable Maasai glossary layer
Build a preservation-oriented language technology demo
Establish a future foundation for Maasai language AI

translation_base.purpose: Instruction-tuned base for English ↔ Maasai translation fine-tuning
